name: Impossible Creole Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the crabmeat.
2. Thaw and well drain the frozen okra; cut up.
3. Heat oven to 400°F. Grease a pie plate, 10 x 1-1/2 inches.
4. Mix the crabmeat, vegetables, chili powder, pepper sauce, Milk, Eggs, Bisquick baking mix, Salt, and Chili powder in a blender on HIGH or beat with a hand beater for 1 minute.
5. Pour into the pie plate.
6. Bake until a knife inserted between the center and edge comes out clean, about 35 to 40 minutes.
7. Allow to cool for 5 minutes before serving.
YIELD: 4 or 5 Servings
